final_prompt.prompt:
Create a museum-grade infographic plate for Chinese ethnic minority costume documentation.

Style/medium: needs a "国家博物馆展板" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 故宫博物院文物图录, 维多利亚与阿尔伯特博物馆服饰档案, 1990s 中国民族志田野调查图谱; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include top header zone (Chinese title + subtitle + intro text), left structural breakdown zone with leader lines and close-up details, upper-right material/texture zone with fabric swatches, center-right pattern/color/symbolism zone with color chips and motif samples, bottom wearing sequence/process flowchart + core characteristics summary; central focal subject must be full-figure standing person in authentic ethnic minority costume or central object breakdown depending on subject suitability
Subject: must include an authentic Chinese ethnic minority costume system (自动判断最合适的主体对象), full garment structure with all key components labeled
Scene/backdrop: must be museum archival paper texture — 米白 / 绢纸白 / 浅茶色 background, no decorative elements, clean scholarly presentation
Lighting/mood: needs a neutral archival documentation atmosphere — even, shadowless, clinical yet respectful — exact light placement is yours
Color palette: must be muted scholarly tones — off-white paper base, ink-black typography, restrained accent colors derived from actual garment pigments only
Materials/textures: must include realistic fabric swatch representations (silk brocade / embroidered cotton / silver ornament / wool felt etc.) with visible weave and surface character
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese text as specified — 顶部主标题 / 副标题 / 导语, 左侧结构拆解中文引线标注, 右上材质工艺说明, 右中纹样色彩寓意说明, 底部穿着顺序与核心特征总结; all text must be 简体中文, clear, regular, readable
Constraints: must preserve museum plate authenticity, no poster/影楼/电商/动漫/cosplay aesthetics, accurate structural labeling, real material representation, scholarly tone throughout
Avoid: must avoid poster styling, studio photography feel, e-commerce layout, anime illustration, cosplay aesthetics, messy labeling, incorrect structure, blurry text, fake materials, excessive decoration
